🙏 Har Har Mahadev - Shiv ji will carry it

ॐ

Om Namah Shivaya

Maa & Baba

Nana ji

This is your space, Gauri.
A place to remember, to write, to send your love
and trust that it always reaches them.

Shiv ji holds them. Shiv ji carries your words. 🙏

✉ Write a letter

Photographs of love

Every moment
was a blessing

Gauri, Maa and Baba — love that needed no words

Taking their blessings

Their hands, always guiding

Maa and Baba, together always

Nana ji

A man full of
warmth and dignity

Passed away · February 2024

Look at him. That warm smile, that mustache, that blue top. A man who carried himself with quiet grace and loved his family completely.


He left in February 2024, and today his memory feels even closer. Nani ji is still here, still carrying his love forward in everything she does.


Shiv ji holds him now, safe and at peace. 🙏

Written by a eight year old heart

The note Baba
kept all these years

Mere pyare Baba, main aap se bahut pyaar karti hoon.

Mujhe pata hai ki aap mujhse bahut pyaar karte hain.

Mere pyare Baba, lekin aap itna badi jaante nahin
ki main aapse kitna pyaar karti hoon.

Written 20 June 2014 — found in Baba's diary
He kept it. All these years. He knew.

𑁍

Baba kept your letter close to his heart all these years.

That love never disappears. It moves. It transforms. It finds its way.

In our faith, Shiv ji — the eternal, the compassionate Mahadev — watches over every soul that has returned to him.

Maa. Baba. Nana ji. All three rest in his care. Safe, together, at peace.

And when you write to them, Shiv ji carries your words.
Every single one. Always.

𑁍

Write to them

Send a letter
through Shiv ji

Whatever is in your heart a memory, a wish, something you never got to say. Write it here. Fold it into a paper plane and trust that Shiv ji will carry it to them.

Dear Baba,

Your letters

Words already
on their way

ॐ

They are not gone.
They rest in Shiv ji's light
and in your love, Gauri.

Every prayer you offer, every memory you hold, every letter you write reaches them. Through Shiv ji, nothing is ever truly lost.

Har Har Mahadev 🙏 — Made with love, for Bettuu
